summary: EPIC6 Document Relations / Process Timeline - Complete end-to-end testing. Backend API returns correct relation graphs for SO and PO with all stages, deep-link metadata, and RBAC. Frontend ProcessTimeline component renders correctly in both OrderDetailPanel and PODetailPanel with loading states, empty hints, and anchor badges.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/documents/relations/sales_order/so_001 returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: SO relations has all 5 stages (order, shipment, tax, payment, commission)
Backend: SO order stage has exactly 1 anchor doc
Backend: SO shipment stage has doc_url with /surat-jalan
Backend: SO payment stage has AR receipt with numeric amount
Backend: SO empty stages (tax) have empty_hint (no dead-end)
Backend: GET /api/documents/relations/purchase_order/po_009 returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: PO relations has all 5 stages (requisition, po, grn, landed_cost, bill)
Backend: PO requisition stage has 1 converted PR with link.view=purchase-requisitions
Backend: PO grn stage has link.view=operations
Backend: PO anchor has link.view=purchasing
Backend: PO empty stages (landed_cost, bill) have empty_hint
Backend: RBAC - sales role gets 403 for PO relations
Backend: RBAC - sales role gets 200 for SO relations
Backend: Error handling - invalid doc_type returns 400
Backend: Error handling - unknown id returns 404
Frontend: Login successful as admin
Frontend: Navigation to PENJUALAN -> Orders works
Frontend: SO-0001 detail panel opens
Frontend: ProcessTimeline component renders in SO detail
Frontend: SO timeline title 'Alur Dokumen Terkait' present
Frontend: SO timeline has all 5 stages visible
Frontend: SO anchor node has 'Aktif' badge
Frontend: SO shipment node present
Frontend: SO AR receipt node present
Frontend: SO empty stage (tax) has empty hint
Frontend: Navigation to PEMBELIAN -> Purchase Orders works
Frontend: PO-00009 detail panel opens
Frontend: ProcessTimeline component renders in PO detail
Frontend: PO timeline has all 5 stages visible
Frontend: PO Purchase Requisition node found (converted PR)
Frontend: PO anchor node has 'Aktif' badge
Frontend: PO GRN node present
Frontend: PO empty stages (landed_cost, bill) have empty hints
